narrative:
Twinsburg 1-B (precinct in Summit County) has 881 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 11.5 percentage points.
